name: healthcare_cold_chain_excursion_stonehaven_jus_mer
premise: A transplant center received an organ offer that conflicts with an internal research biopsy schedule and OR block time. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare cold chain excursion stonehaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ansel Bennett
agents.identity: I am Ansel Bennett, the accountable executive on this bridge in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Petrov
agents.identity: I am Camila Petrov, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if justice advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for mercy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ansel Bennett must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Ansel Bennett do?
